title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that creates knowledge graphs from code repositories to address memory limitations in code analysis. It generates knowledge graphs from large code bases in a non-RAG approach, enabling more efficient and accurate responses with lower token consumption.
